summary: Fix calendar Upcoming showing UI junk instead of real meetings.

fixed: Upcoming no longer shows Google Calendar UI prompts like “Add a working location” or “Add location” at midnight
Calendar sync now loads events from all selected calendars, not just primary — work meetings on shared and team calendars appear in Upcoming
Timed events with timezone offsets (e.g. +10:00) parse correctly from the session API
DOM scraping is only used as a last resort when API and iCal sync return nothing — stale junk is not merged back in
